rooms.name: Long Road -- Junction Post
rooms.description: A crossroads where the Long Road meets the southern trade route. A wooden post marks distances to six settlements in six directions. Caravan ruts groove the packed earth. A fire ring suggests this is where travelers camp when the next town is too far. A Farborn man sits on a crate near the fire ring, watching the road with the focused patience of someone who has been watching it for months.

sounds: the creak of a campfire ring cooling
smells: the faint sweetness of dried rations
ambient_details: The Farborn man doesn't approach. He watches. He has learned that the people who matter come to him.
Six distance markers point in six directions. The one toward Spur Tower has fresh scratches, as if someone counted the distance more than once.

npc_relevance.9520: Griff. Farborn caravan-master. Maeren's father. Waiting.

rooms.name: Long Road -- Trade Post
rooms.description: A low adobe building where Long Road caravans resupply and exchange information. A board inside the door lists trade offers, labor requests, and -- in a bottom corner, in careful handwriting -- a description of a young Farborn woman who vanished four months ago. No name. Just a description. And a note: 'Information to Griff, Junction Post. Will pay.'

ambience.mood: transactional with an undercurrent of grief
sounds: the thump of goods being stacked
someone reading the notice board aloud
ambient_details: The missing-person notice has been rewritten three times. The handwriting gets steadier each time, not shakier. That's worse.
